# Coding instructions

- Prefer self-explanatory code.
- Add comments only for non-obvious intent, invariants, constraints, workarounds, security boundaries, or surprising tradeoffs.
- Keep comments factual, neutral, and normally one sentence.
- Never mention prompts, AI use, the user-agent collaboration, debugging history, or obvious implementation steps in code comments.
- Preserve required API documentation, license notices, generated markers, and safety-critical explanations.
- Use the relevant Agent Skills; in this repository the canonical sources live under `skills/`, while consuming projects discover installed copies under `.agents/skills` or `.github/skills`.
